review.selection_rule: among pre-failure, pre-seam, non-passing checkpoints: maximize target conditions met, then fill fraction, then minimize normalized overburden deficit

review_decision: No model or recipe is accepted by this block. The unresolved seam is now followed by the identifiable lambda-by-sticking access/coverage surface, not another blind recipe search.

provenance.evidence_class: coarse morphology screen; grid delta 0.01 is not accepted for scored fill conclusions
provenance.rng_policy: base seed plus checkpoint index; checkpoint-interval comparisons require replicated paired-distribution analysis, not exact pathwise equality

topology_transition.reason: opposing fronts removed a long sub-resolution tail; seam-free closure cannot be certified
